title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ECIL Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ECIL Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ECIL Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ECIL Holdings Services:
ECIL Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL Holdings Services!
